description: Review fixes: (1) Custom recurrence days field is dead code, (2) Bulk action bar dropdowns are hover-only, (3) Prompt injection in templates/autopilot - use system_instruction separation.
steps: STEP 1 - Fix getNextDueDate to respect the days array when recurrence.type is 'custom'
STEP 2 - Replace hover-only CSS with click-toggle state in bulk action bar dropdowns
STEP 3 - Refactor templates.py to use system_instruction parameter
STEP 4 - Refactor autopilot.py to use system_instruction parameter
STEP 5 - Verify build and lint pass
acceptance_criteria: getNextDueDate for custom recurrence finds next occurrence on a matching weekday from the days array
Bulk action bar sub-menus toggle on click instead of hover
templates.py uses system_instruction parameter with only user goal text in user message
autopilot.py uses system_instruction parameter with only user data in user message
python3 -m py_compile passes for all backend files
